entity.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange ecosystem that began as a direct user-to-user exchange service in 2016 and later added a centralized spot exchange, P2P markets, token services, and related products. BIT.TEAM's official website, documentation, account flows, and current exchange services remain available.
entity.notes: Launch is stored at year precision because BIT.TEAM's official history states that the platform launched in 2016 without a reliable exact public-launch day. The wider platform initially focused on user-to-user exchange; an additional centralized crypto exchange was launched in early 2022. Official material describes UK registration and a primary service footprint in Russia and CIS countries.

events.title: BIT.TEAM platform launched
events.description: BIT.TEAM began operating in 2016 as a direct cryptocurrency exchange service connecting users.
events.notes: Year-level marker from the official company-history page.

events.title: BIT.TEAM expanded with a centralized crypto exchange
events.description: BIT.TEAM launched an additional centralized exchange service in early 2022 alongside its existing P2P and exchange ecosystem.
events.notes: Stored at year precision because the official articles describe an early-2022 launch without a reliable exact date.

evidence.title: BIT.TEAM company history
evidence.notes: Official About page states that BIT.TEAM launched in 2016 and describes its original direct-exchange model.

evidence.title: What is the BIT.TEAM ecosystem?
evidence.notes: Official article states that a crypto exchange was launched in early 2022 as part of the BIT.TEAM ecosystem.

evidence.title: BIT.TEAM continues to operate in Russia and CIS countries
evidence.notes: Official article describes the platform's UK registration, regional operating footprint, and centralized exchange expansion.

evidence.title: BIT.TEAM official exchange site
evidence.notes: Current official site provides live cryptocurrency exchange and account entry points.

evidence.title: BIT.TEAM user documentation
evidence.notes: Current official documentation provides registration, trading, deposit, withdrawal, and account-use instructions.
